reasoning: Elon Musk's net worth is currently over $450 billion, likely in the $500B-$600B range according to recent Bloomberg index snippets from late 2025. His closest rival, Larry Ellison (or possibly Jeff Bezos), sits lower, usually in the $330B-$390B range. Ellison briefly surpassed Musk for a single day in September 2025 due to an Oracle stock surge, but Musk has comfortably reclaimed the lead with a massive margin (at least a $50B-$100B+ buffer). With only about three weeks left until December 31, 2025, it would take an unprecedented combination of a massive drop in Tesla/SpaceX valuation and a huge surge for a competitor within a very short timeframe to displace Musk. The betting market assessed this at 94% on Nov 27, and given the consistent lead and limited time remaining, it is extremely likely he will hold the #1 spot on resolution day.
